scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n FRONT,BACK -c cyan,yellow "vite" "cd backend && node src/index.js"
scripts.start:jarvis: concurrently -n VITE,JARVIS -c cyan,magenta "vite" "cd meta-ads-bot/ghost-mouse && python orchestrator_server.py"
scripts.start:s180: set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 && concurrently -n VITE,ORQUESTADOR,GMAPS,LINKEDIN,CAMPAIGN -c cyan,magenta,green,blue,yellow "vite" "cd meta-ads-bot/ghost-mouse && python orchestrator_server.py" "cd meta-ads-bot/ghost-mouse && python gmaps_ghost_scraper.py auto" "cd meta-ads-bot/ghost-mouse && python linkedin_ghost.py auto" "cd meta-ads-bot/ghost-mouse && python ai_smart_campaign.py --force"
